supplements.pre_workout: 1-2 scoops ON Amino Energy (20-30 mins prior)
supplements.post_workout: 2 scoops Whey (25g protein per scoop) + 5g Creatine

master_workout_logic.rule_of_progression: Add 5lbs to the 'Big 2' lifts every week or 1-2 reps at current weight.

exercises.name: Lat Pulldowns
exercises.cue: Thumbless grip; pull with elbows; target 80-100lbs

exercises.name: Seated Cable Rows
exercises.cue: Stay upright; retract scapula; target 70-90lbs

exercises.name: Face Pulls
exercises.cue: Rope to forehead; pull ends apart for rear delts

exercises.name: Rope Hammer Curls
exercises.cue: Neutral grip; flare rope ends outward at peak

exercises.name: Incline DB Curls
exercises.cue: Full bicep stretch at bottom; sit back on bench

exercises.name: Dead Hangs
exercises.cue: Posture reset; decompress spine after desk work

exercises.name: Incline DB Press
exercises.cue: 45° Incline; slow stretch; target 35-45lbs

exercises.name: Standing DB Press
exercises.cue: Squeeze glutes; standing for posture; target 25-35lbs

exercises.name: Lateral Raises
exercises.cue: Lead with elbows; pinkies up for side delt width

exercises.name: Cable Flyes
exercises.cue: 1s squeeze at center to etch chest line

exercises.name: Tricep Rope Pushdowns
exercises.cue: Elbows bolted to ribs; pull rope apart at bottom

exercises.name: Leg Press
exercises.cue: Feet shoulder-width; control the descent; target 2-3 plates

exercises.name: Leg Extensions
exercises.cue: 2s pause/squeeze at the top for quad definition

exercises.name: Seated Leg Curls
exercises.cue: Focus on the 'burn'; slow return to starting position

exercises.name: Standing Calf Raises
exercises.cue: Deep stretch at bottom; hold peak for 1s

exercises.name: DB Flat Press
exercises.cue: Moderate weight; focus on mind-muscle connection

exercises.name: Single Arm Rows
exercises.cue: Drive elbow back; don't rotate the torso

exercises.name: Lateral Raises
exercises.cue: High volume for capped shoulder look

exercises.name: Cable Curls / Pushdowns
exercises.cue: Superset these for maximum arm pump

exercises.name: Dumbbell RDLs
exercises.cue: Hinge at hips; feel stretch in hamstrings; keep back flat

exercises.name: Goblet Squats
exercises.cue: Hold DB at chest; keep core engaged; deep squat

exercises.name: Walking Lunges
exercises.cue: Large steps; keep torso upright

exercises.name: Plank
exercises.cue: Vacuum belly button to spine; tight midsection focus

meals.label: Meal 3
meals.description: Factor Protein Plus OR 7oz Chicken + Greens

meals.label: Dinner
meals.description: Factor Keto Beef OR 1c 90/10 Ground Beef + Broccoli

rules: Add 500ml water per Factor meal to prevent puffiness
Rest day: remove white rice and halve Factor carbs
